akus.body: Revākhaṇḍa of the Vāyupurāṇa
RKV adhyāya

oṃ namaḥ śrīpuruṣottamāya / oṃ namaḥ śrīnarmadāyai / oṃ namo hariharahiraṇyagarbhebhyo namo vyāsavālmīkiśukaparāśarebhyo namo gurugobrāhmaṇebhyaḥ / oṃ majjanmātaṅgagaṇḍacyutamadamadirāmodamattālimālaṃ snānaiḥ siddhāṅganānāṃ kucayugavigalat kuṅkumāsaṅgapiṅgam / sāyaṃ prātarmunīnāṃ kusumacayasamācchannatīrasthavṛkṣaṃ pāyādvo narmadāmbhaḥ karimakarakarākrāntarahaṃstaraṃgam //
|| iti śrīskānde mahāpurāṇa ekāśītisāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ pañcama āvantyakhaṇḍe revākhaṇḍe purāṇasaṃhitāvarṇanām prathamo 'dhyāyaḥ ||
RKV adhyāya
|| iti śrīskānde mahāpurāṇa ekāśītisāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ pañcama āvantyakhaṇḍe revākhaṇḍe revāmāhātmyavarṇanaṃnāma dvitīyo 'dhyāyaḥ ||
RKV adhyāya

īśvara uvāca: bhānumatī dvijānbhojya bubhuje bhuktaśeṣataḥ / bhuktvā susukhamāsthāya tadannaṃ pariṇāmya ca //
śrīmārkaṇḍeya uvāca: tato gacchenmahīpāla kohanasveti viśrutam / sarvapāpaharaṃ puṇyaṃ tīrthaṃ mṛtyuvināśanam //
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca: tato gaccheddharāpāla śīvatīrthamanuttamam / darśanādyasya devasya mucyate sarvakilbiṣaiḥ //
śrīmārkaṇḍeya uvāca: tato gacchenmahīpāla eraṇḍītīrthamuttamam / snānamātreṇa tatraiva brahmahatyā praṇaśyati //
